name: TP-Link Omada MCP server
description: A Model Context Protocol server that exposes TP-Link Omada controller APIs to AI copilots and automation workflows, enabling listing sites, devices, clients, and invoking arbitrary Omada endpoints.

name: async-claude-agentsdk-mcp
description: An MCP server that enables coding agents to run Claude Agent SDK sessions as asynchronous sub-agents, with tools for starting, continuing, and checking status of Claude sessions.

name: Postcept/mcp
description: MCP server for Postcept

name: Lease Intelligence MCP Server
description: Enables querying, extracting terms, and projecting rent from commercial lease documents via MCP tools.

name: docker-mcp-server
description: More than just a fully featured MCP server that lets AI agents manage Docker — containers, images, networks, volumes, swarm services, secrets, configs, nodes, plugins, etc., it helps you create workflows to easily manage your Docker environments.

name: ctrl-memory
description: A lightweight, local-first MCP memory server for LLM agents that enables storing, searching, and retrieving agent memories with zero external dependencies.

name: demo-mcp
description: Public shared memory MCP server for OKF markdown notes and links with optional human summaries, featuring a web UI and MCP read/write access.

name: code-security-mcp
description: An MCP server that exposes a 216-rule Kotlin/JVM security analyzer to AI coding agents, enabling real-time security scanning and secure pattern retrieval for frameworks like Spring and Ktor.

name: AI News MCP Server
description: Fetches recent AI news from curated RSS feeds, summarizes them with OpenAI, and caches results in AWS DynamoDB for efficient access.

name: Finance Intelligence MCP Server
description: A production-grade MCP server that provides AI assistants with real-time financial market data, company metrics, and historical prices using yfinance and FastMCP.

name: AI Token Cost Optimization MCP Server
description: Provides tools to count tokens, estimate API costs, optimize prompts, and compare AI model pricing for multiple LLMs.

name: company-brain-mcp
description: Enables AI agents to query and manage company knowledge from a Supabase GraphRAG store, including accounts, meetings, people, org hierarchy, product docs, and call logs.

name: TD/OMS MCP
description: A standalone MCP server for TD/OMS change management that connects directly to TD/OMS REST APIs and enables workflow planning, execution, and monitoring for IBM i development tools.

name: songsterr-mcp
description: Fetch Songsterr tabs and transpose them between tunings and string counts, outputting ASCII or Guitar Pro files.

name: PR Guardian MCP
description: Analyzes GitHub Pull Request diffs for security vulnerabilities and data leaks, using a deterministic filter to skip trivial changes and an AI-powered analysis for logic changes.

name: MPC-PoC-2-ResourceProvider-GoogleSheets
description: MCP server that exposes Google Sheets as read-only resources, providing static and templated URI access to sheet data as CSV.

name: helios-calcom-mcp
description: Secure MCP wrapper for Cal.com integration, exposing calendar booking tools to Hermes/Helios.

name: mcp-keycloak
description: Enables secure MCP tool calls (add and multiply numbers) by validating OAuth2 tokens via Keycloak token introspection.

name: Serpentine3D MCP Server
description: Enables AI to view the Serpentine3D viewport, create NURBS geometry, and execute commands, integrating AI directly into the modelling workflow.
